_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Fastify
author: https://nyxel.my.id
description: Host a Fastify Node.js application with auto-update, private repo support, production/development modes, optional Cloudflare Tunnel, and .env injection.
startup: bash -c "mkdir -p /home/container/.pterodactyl && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/fastify/entrypoint.sh -o /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh || { echo '[EGG] Failed to download entrypoint!'; exit 1; } && chmod +x /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh && bash /home/container/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh"

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Fastify Installation Script — nyxel

set -e

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.pterodactyl
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Synxx12/nyxel-eggs/main/eggs/fastify/entrypoint.sh -o /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/.pterodactyl/entrypoint.sh
echo "[INSTALL] entrypoint.sh downloaded to .pterodactyl/"

cd /mnt/server

if [ -n "${GIT_URL}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    GIT_URL="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_URL} | sed 's|https://||')"
  fi
  if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Git repo already present — pulling latest..."
    git reset --hard && git pull
  else
    echo "[INSTALL] Wiping directory and cloning fresh..."
    find /mnt/server -mindepth 1 -not -path '/mnt/server/.pterodactyl*' -delete 2>/dev/null || true
    if [ -z "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then git clone "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/r; else git clone --single-branch --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_URL}" /tmp/r; fi
    cp -a /tmp/r/. /mnt/server/ && rm -rf /tmp/r
  fi
  if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "[INSTALL] Installing Node.js dependencies..."
    cd /mnt/server
    PM="${PACKAGE_MANAGER:-auto}"
    if [ "$PM" = "auto" ]; then
      [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ] && PM="pnpm" || { [ -f yarn.lock ] && PM="yarn" || PM="npm"; }
    fi
    case "$PM" in
      pnpm) npm install -g pnpm --quiet && (pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || pnpm install) ;;
      yarn) npm install -g yarn --quiet && (yarn install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || yarn install) ;;
      *)    [ -f package-lock.json ] && npm ci || npm install ;;
    esac
    echo "[INSTALL] Dependencies installed."
  fi
else
  echo "[INSTALL] GIT_URL is empty — skipping clone. Upload your project files via File Manager."
fi

echo "[INSTALL] Done."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: HTTPS URL to your Fastify Git repository (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo). Leave empty to skip cloning — upload files manually via File Manager.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and run (e.g. main, master, production). Leave empty to use the repository default branch.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to pull latest commits on every startup. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: GitHub/GitLab username for private repositories. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for private repositories (https://github.com/settings/tokens). Requires at least 'repo' scope. Leave empty for public repos.

variables.name: Run Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' to run compiled output. Set to 'development' for nodemon/tsx watch mode with hot-reload. Recommended: production for live servers.

variables.name: Package Manager
variables.description: Package manager to use. Set to 'auto' to detect automatically from lockfile (pnpm-lock.yaml -> pnpm, yarn.lock -> yarn, otherwise npm). Options: auto, npm, pnpm, yarn.

variables.name: Entry Point
variables.description: Main file to run in production. Auto-detected from package.json 'main' field if empty. Examples: src/index.js, dist/index.js, server.js.

variables.name: Build Command
variables.description: Build command for TypeScript projects (e.g. 'tsc', 'tsup'). Leave empty for plain JS projects (no build needed).

variables.name: Cloudflare Tunnel Token
variables.description: Optional. Cloudflare Tunnel token from your Zero Trust dashboard (Networks > Tunnels > Configure > Run token). Leave empty to disable the tunnel.
